name: conform-workspace
description: Drop-in PM conformance fixture: multi-package workspace (neutral `workspaces` field) with a `workspace:*` internal dep. The real PM writes a MULTI-IMPORTER lockfile (pnpm `importers:` map / npm workspace `packages` entries / bun workspace blocks) and resolves `workspace:*` to the sibling on disk; Direction A asserts nub frozen-reads that multi-importer lockfile. The root carries one real registry dep so the node_modules assertion is meaningful.
